title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services:
Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services!
